creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

To submitter:  You might have to give more details of the problems 
you are seeing. 

FWIW, I use Opera as my primary browser, and have not noticed any 
issues with the website relating to that, so I'm assuming you're 
PR isn't about issues you are seeing.  It's presumably also not 
about Opera not being mentioned as a browser enough, as the only page 
I'm aware of (http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/handbook/desktop-browsers.html) 
that mentions browser choices, lists Opera as a good choice. 

Please, give us more details about the problem you perceive.
